# Nanobanana PPT

## Overview
Creates compact, high-impact presentation decks inspired by the Nanobanana design language — bold typography, vibrant colors, and minimalist layouts.

## Style
- Large, bold headlines (48-72px)
- Monochrome or duotone color schemes
- Minimal text per slide (10-15 words)
- Strong geometric shapes as visual anchors
- High-contrast color blocking

## Workflow
1. Distill content to one core message per slide
2. Choose a 2-color palette
3. Set typography: one font, 3 weights (bold heading, regular body, light accent)
4. Add geometric shapes for visual interest
5. Review: remove every element that isn't essential
